faqs.question: What internet speed do I need for 4K IPTV?
faqs.answer: For smooth 4K streaming, we recommend at least 25 Mbps. IPTV 4K World uses adaptive bitrate technology.

faqs.answer: Major sports channels, movie channels, and premium content are available in 4K. Other channels are in HD or FHD quality.
